zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Richardson II於1523年5月14日出生在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾時，他的父親Thomas Richardson I20歲，母親Lady Mary Margaret Beeston19歲。他於大約1540年與Mary Champney在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1568年3月4日在他的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Richardson II于1523年5月14日出生在英国賀特福爾維斯特米爾时，他的父亲Thomas Richardson I20岁，母亲Lady Mary Margaret Beeston19岁。他于大约1540年与Mary Champney在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1568年3月4日在他的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Richardson II was born on 14 May 1523, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Richardson I, was 20 and his mother, Lady Mary Margaret Beeston, was 19. He married Mary Champney about 1540, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 4 March 1568, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Richardson II est né le 14 mai 1523, à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Richardson I, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Margaret Beeston, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Mary Champney environ 1540, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 mars 1568, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Richardson II am 14. Mai 1523 in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Richardson I 20 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Margaret Beeston 19. Er hat um 1540 in England Mary Champney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. März 1568 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Richardson II è nato il il 14 maggio 1523 nel Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Richardson I, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Margaret Beeston, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Mary Champney circa 1540, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 marzo 1568, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Richardson IIが1523年5月14日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルで生まれた時，父Thomas Richardson Iは20歳，母Lady Mary Margaret Beestonは19歳であった。約1540年にイギリスでMary Champneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1568年3月4日に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Richardson II(이)가 1523년 5월 14일 영국 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Richardson I(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Margaret Beeston(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1540년 영국에서 Mary Champney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1568년 3월 4일 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.14 May 1523–4 March 1568: 14 de maio de 1523–4 de março de 1568
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Richardson II nasceu em 14 de maio de 1523, em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Richardson I, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Margaret Beeston, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Champney aproximadamente 1540, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de março de 1568, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Richardson II родился 14 мая 1523 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Richardson I было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Margaret Beeston, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Champney около 1540 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 марта 1568 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.

es.14 May 1523–4 March 1568: 14 de mayo de 1523–4 de marzo de 1568
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Richardson II nació el 14 de mayo de 1523, en Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Richardson I, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Margaret Beeston, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Mary Champney aproximadamente 1540, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1568, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años.
